<!-- AUTOGENERATED by praxis/docs.py - do not edit by hand -->
# Integrations

**Third-party, non-core add-ons.** These live in the repo for convenience, but they are
not part of the Praxis framework proper. Each one is optional and self-contained under
`integrations/<name>/`, loads only when its activation flag is set, and installs its own
dependencies on demand. Praxis runs fine with none of them enabled.

See [`integrations/README.md`](../integrations/README.md) for the directory layout and how to add one.

## `cut_cross_entropy` (v0.1.0)

Apple's memory-efficient cut cross-entropy loss integration for Praxis

- Activation: always on when installed
- Provides: `lifecycle`, `loss_functions`
- Source: [`integrations/cut_cross_entropy/`](../integrations/cut_cross_entropy/README.md)

## `discord` (v0.1.0)

Discord bot integration for chat

- Activation: `--discord`
- Provides: `api_server_hooks`, `cli`, `lifecycle`
- Source: [`integrations/discord/`](../integrations/discord/README.md)

## `gun` (v0.1.0)

Gun.js decentralized data adapter for live chat integration

- Activation: `--gun`
- Provides: `cli_args`, `datasets`, `lifecycle`
- Source: [`integrations/gun/`](../integrations/gun/README.md)

## `hivemind` (v0.1.0)

Decentralized deep learning integration for distributed training across the Hivemind swarm

- Activation: `--hivemind`
- Provides: `decentralized_training`, `distributed_experts`, `hooks`, `p2p_networking`, `remote_experts`
- Source: [`integrations/hivemind/`](../integrations/hivemind/README.md)

## `neurallambda` (v0.1.0)

Differentiable stack-based memory and neural reasoning tools for advanced routing

- Activation: always on when installed
- Provides: `neural_controller`, `stack_memory`, `tool_selection`
- Source: [`integrations/neurallambda/`](../integrations/neurallambda/README.md)

## `ngrok` (v0.1.0)

Ngrok tunnel integration for exposing API server

- Activation: `--ngrok`
- Provides: `api_server_hooks`, `cli`, `lifecycle`, `request_middleware`
- Source: [`integrations/ngrok/`](../integrations/ngrok/README.md)

## `quantum` (v0.1.0)

Quantum computing code dataset from qoblib

- Activation: `--quantum`
- Provides: `cli_args`, `datasets`, `lifecycle`
- Source: [`integrations/quantum/`](../integrations/quantum/README.md)

## `tokenmonster` (v0.1.0)

TokenMonster pretrained vocabularies as a Praxis tokenizer

- Activation: always on when installed
- Source: [`integrations/tokenmonster/`](../integrations/tokenmonster)

## `wandb` (v0.1.0)

Weights & Biases integration for Praxis

- Activation: `--wandb`
- Provides: `cleanup_dirs`, `cli`, `lifecycle`, `logger_providers`, `loggers`
- Source: [`integrations/wandb/`](../integrations/wandb/README.md)
